subject: Use RC1 version of parent poms and SDC client
commit_message:
Use RC1 version of parent poms and SDC client

Update to use RC1 version of parent poms and released
version of SDC client.

Change-Id: I4446f8819e815c5bf76dde9614228ccd4a68187d
Issue-ID: CCSDK-2344
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-northbound-maven-javadoc-verify-frankfurt-openjdk8/3/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-northbound-maven-javadoc-verify-frankfurt-openjdk8/3/ )
